#### Goals for this Module
- [x] Check games that have some mechanics that affect the game playability 
- [x] Analyze real games and checking they mechanics
- [x] Explain the choices of the games and teh reasons 

#### Progress
- **What I accomplished**:
  - Reviewed examples of what are good and bad game mechanics 
  - Analyze games to idnetify the bad things and how it can be improved.

- **Challenges faced**:
  - Choosing mechanics that were easy to explain and not too complicated.
  - Finding the right gaems or atleast games I have played before.

- **Solutions**:
  - Focus on games I played before and understand the mechanics of the game.
  - Kept explanation simple and easy to udnerstand so other people understand.
 
#### Learnings
- A game cannot be considered bad becuase one issue, has to have multiple errors to  be considered like that. 
- Small design changes can improve the playability of a gameplay.
